nasb.text: And wanting to ascertain the charge for which they were accusing him, I brought him down to their Council;

esv.text: And desiring to know the charge for which they were accusing him, I brought him down to their council.

cnv.text: 為要知道猶太人控告他的原因，我就帶他到他們的公議會那裡去。

ccb.text: 为了弄清楚他们控告他的缘由，我押他到犹太人的公会受审，

csbs.text: 我想了解犹太人控告他的理由，就带他到他们的议会去。
